themes.scene_description: Emma Woods decides to join a marathon competition at the manor grounds. Her friends Emily Dyer and Naidu cheer her on as she runs toward the finishing line, fighting to cross it and win the gold medal.

Serveran and Kreacher Pierson go surfing at a mysterious beach near the manor. Suddenly a shark appears and their board starts to sink — they must learn to sink or swim to survive the dangerous waves.

Orpheus faces an important decision in the manor library. He must compare both choices carefully — neither option seems easy, and he must find the courage to continue fighting despite the risk of losing.
Before Naidu's big match, Emma Woods encourages her friend to stay confident. She reminds her to pay attention to her lifelong dream and believe in her spirit — success and victory are within reach.

review.scene_description: As the day ends, the survivors gather at the manor. Last but not least, Orpheus scores a point on the chalk line and wonders what adventures tomorrow shall bring, thanks to their teamwork.
